title: Docker Build
description: Build a Docker image using the project's src/docker/Dockerfile

imageName.description: Image name. Defaults to the NX project name.

dockerfile.description: Path to the Dockerfile relative to the workspace root. Defaults to {projectRoot}/src/docker/Dockerfile.

context.description: Docker build context path relative to the workspace root.

buildArgs.description: Key/value build arguments passed as --build-arg flags.

platform.description: Target platform (e.g. linux/amd64). Omit to use the host platform.

push.description: Push the image to the registry after building.

labels.description: Key/value image labels passed as --label flags.
